caller_reference.description: A unique identifier for the CloudFront origin access identity.

cloudfront_access_identity_path.description: The path to the CloudFront origin access identity.

comment.description: An optional comment for the CloudFront origin access identity.

etag.description: The current version of the CloudFront origin access identity, useful for change tracking.

iam_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM user associated with the CloudFront origin access identity.

s3_canonical_user_id.description: The canonical user ID used by Amazon S3 to identify the CloudFront origin access identity.
